@sepo-agent /implement

Record the entry below in the diary. Definition of done: the matching
`content/diary/YYYY-MM-DD.md` note exists (created or appended), it is
listed newest-first in `content/diary/_meta.json`, durable thoughts are
replanted as seedling ideas and linked, and `npm run check:site` passes.

<!-- Entries default to today; name a date in the entry to backfill another day. -->
